title: Polestar Launches Largest Model Offensive Four New EVs by 2028
text: Polestar announced largest product offensive on February 18, 2026 planning to launch four new EVs by end of 2028. Expansion follows record 2025 sales of approximately 60,119 units, 34% increase from 2024. Four planned models include Polestar 5 grand tourer launching summer 2026 with Dual Motor producing 748 hp and Performance variant delivering 884 hp, 800-volt charging and 350 kW DC fast charging capability, priced from €119,900 in Europe with production in China. Polestar 4 Estate Wagon launching Q4 2026 as estate-style variant with conventional rear window and space of estate with SUV versatility, Korean production sidestepping tariff complications. Next-generation Polestar 2 launching early 2027 as completely redesigned successor following over 190,000 units sold globally since 2020. Polestar 7 compact SUV launching 2028 as premium compact addressing market gap representing approximately one-third of European EV sales in 2025, with production at Volvo's Slovakia facility marking Polestar's first European-manufactured model. CEO Michael Lohscheller targets roughly 100,000 annual retail sales.
